title: 🏰 SeriousRP
description: Add some roleplay mechanics to your server !
body:
# 🏰 SeriousRP
This plugin make you server more RP than before, it adds commands like random tp, economy and more !

### Translations 
https://github.com/stan1712/SeriousRP/wiki/Translations

## Commands

### System commands
- /seriousrp help : `seriousrp.info`・Show the help message​
  - Alias : `/srp help`
- /seriousrp version : `seriousrp.info`・Shows the version of the plugin​
  - Alias : `/srp version`
- /seriousrp modules : `seriousrp.info`・Show the status of the modules plugin
  - Alias : `/srp modules`
- /seriousrp reload : `seriousrp.admin.reload`・Reload the config file​
  - Alias : `/srp reload`

### RP commands :​
- /srtp : `seriousrp.randomtp`・Allow to teleport in a radius of 10000 random blocks​
  - Alias : `/rtp`
- /cheque <amount> : `seriousrp.economy.cheques`・Allow you to create a cheque​
  - Alias : `/cq`

### Medics commands :
- /vitals <player> : `seriousrp.medics.info`・Allow you to know the medical state of a player
  - Alias : `/medinfo <player>`
- /revive <player> : `seriousrp.medics.revive`・Revive and heal another player
- /hrprevive : `seriousrp.medics.hrprevive`・Revives and heal you


**If you want to submit a suggestion, join our discord and tell us your idea ^^ : https://discord.gg/tfnpBth**

## Terms of Use 
- You are not permitted to **decompile** or **modify** the plugin in any form.
- You are not permitted to **redistribute** the plugin in any form, including as a part of any software package.
- You agree to make an effort to get help (by DM'ing me) if you are **having problems**, before leaving a review.
- We reserve the right to change these Terms **at any time**, and you agree to abide by the most recent version of this.
